content.text: Research Assistant @ ZJU ZipLab. Optimized sparse attention and KV-management strategies for video world models, preserving generation quality while delivering up to 5.67x inference acceleration.
Infrastructure Maintainer @ X-Lab, Zhejiang University. Orchestrated cluster operations and Docker-based environments for multiple research groups; deployed and maintained internal Overleaf services.
